title: rotala serpyllifolia
intro: Rotala serpyllifolia, also known as Indian pipeplant or Rotala, is a perennial, flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rotala serpyllifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Rotala serpyllifolia is often prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
